name: GAF_SyteLine_JobNumberLookup_Tool_v1
description: Look up the next available BOM job number from SLHighKeys in SyteLine

data.api_docs:
Method: GET
Endpoint: /load/SLHighKeys
CRITICAL: The endpoint above is RELATIVE — the service path 'CSI/IDORequestService/ido' is prepended automatically. Do NOT repeat the service path in the endpoint or add tenant names, config values, 'api', 'invoke', or extra segments.
Headers:
X-Infor-MongooseConfig: <site>
Query Parameters:
Parameter: properties
Format: STRING
Required: True
Description: MUST be exactly: HighKey
Parameter: filter
Format: STRING
Required: True
Description: MUST be exactly: Prefix='BOM'
Parameter: recordCap
Format: INTEGER
Required: False
Description: Set to 1 (only one record expected for the BOM prefix).
Response Fields:
- Items: Array of matching records (0 or 1 entries)
- HighKey: Last-used BOM job number (e.g., BOM0000005). Always 10 chars: 3-char prefix + 7 numeric digits.
Parsing:
- If Items array has 1+ records: extract HighKey value (e.g., BOM0000005). Next available = numeric portion + 1, zero-padded to 7 digits with BOM prefix. Example: BOM0000005 -> next is BOM0000006.
- If Items array is empty: no BOM jobs exist yet. Start at BOM0000001.
Job number format: BOM0000001 through BOM9999999 (already 10 chars, no left-padding needed).
Example Request:
GET /load/SLHighKeys?properties=HighKey&filter=Prefix='BOM'&recordCap=1
data.responseInstructions:
The API responds with a JSON object containing an Items array.
If Items array has 1+ records:
  Extract HighKey (e.g., 'BOM0000005').
  Strip the 'BOM' prefix to get the numeric portion (e.g., '0000005' = 5).
  Next available job number = 5 + 1 = 6 -> 'BOM0000006'.
  Report: 'Last used: BOM0000005. Next available: BOM0000006.'
If Items array is empty:
  No BOM prefix jobs exist. Start at BOM0000001.
  Report: 'No existing BOM jobs. Next available: BOM0000001.'
The agent should assign job numbers sequentially from the next available number.
CRITICAL - IF ERROR OCCURS INCLUDE THE BELOW IN RESPONSE
  ---DEBUG---
  FULL_URL: [The complete URL that was called]
  FULL_RESPONSE: [The complete API response received]
  ---END DEBUG---

instructions:
Look up the next available BOM job number from SLHighKeys.
Returns the last-used HighKey for the BOM prefix. Parse to compute next available.
Empty result = no BOM jobs yet, start at BOM0000001.
Used by agent in Step 3 if prompt does not specify job numbers,
or to recover if prompt-specified numbers are stale.

SITE: <site> placeholder = [TENANT]_DALS from agent input.
